query:
-- Update BI00018 speed tier from S0412 plan name (NBN 25/10 -> 25/10)
UPDATE billing_items SET parsedSpeedTier = '25/10' WHERE externalId = 'BI00018';

-- Bulk update: for all bundle billing items, derive speed tier from assigned ABB Internet service plan name
-- Pattern: "NBN 25/10" -> "25/10", "NBN 50/20" -> "50/20", "NBN 100/40" -> "100/40", "NBN 250/25" -> "250/25"
UPDATE billing_items bi
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN services s ON s.externalId = sba.serviceExternalId AND s.serviceType = 'Internet' AND s.provider = 'ABB'
SET bi.parsedSpeedTier = CASE
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%250%' THEN '250/25'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%100/40%' THEN '100/40'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%100%' THEN '100/20'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%50/20%' THEN '50/20'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%50%' THEN '50/20'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%25/10%' THEN '25/10'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%25%' THEN '25/10'
  WHEN s.planName LIKE '%12/1%' THEN '12/1'
  ELSE bi.parsedSpeedTier
END
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%' AND (bi.parsedSpeedTier IS NULL OR bi.parsedSpeedTier = '');

-- Verify BI00018 now has speed tier
SELECT externalId, parsedSpeedTier, parsedContractMonths, parsedHas4gBackup, parsedDataAllowance, retailBundleComponent
FROM billing_items WHERE externalId = 'BI00018';

-- Count how many bundle items now have speed tier populated
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN parsedSpeedTier != '' AND parsedSpeedTier IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasSpeed,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%';
